context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures hero CTA buttons to use in-page hash anchors: primary CTA to #tiers (so conversion-ready visitors jump directly to subscription options), and secondary CTA to #how-it-works (for education-first visitors). Also verifies that matching anchor targets exist on the page.

checklist.name: Primary CTA links to #tiers
checklist.description: The hero section's primary button (button_link_1 or first button) has a value of '#tiers' or a URL ending in '#tiers'

checklist.name: Secondary CTA links to #how-it-works
checklist.description: The hero section's secondary button (button_link_2 or second button) has a value of '#how-it-works' or a URL ending in '#how-it-works'

checklist.name: Two CTAs in hero
checklist.description: The hero image-banner section contains exactly two button links (both button_link_1 and button_link_2 populated, or both entries in a buttons block)

checklist.name: Anchor target for #tiers exists
checklist.description: A custom-liquid section containing an <a> tag with id="tiers" appears in templates/index.json before the tier picker section

checklist.name: Anchor target for #how-it-works exists
checklist.description: A custom-liquid section containing an <a> tag with id="how-it-works" appears in templates/index.json before the how-it-works section

checklist.name: Anchors use hash notation in hero
checklist.description: Hero button links use hash fragment notation (starting with '#') rather than full page paths for the in-page anchors

checklist.name: Primary button is not secondary style
checklist.description: The primary hero CTA (linking to #tiers) is NOT marked as a secondary-style button (button_style_secondary_1 is false or absent)

checklist.name: Full section structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all standard subscription homepage sections: image-banner, custom-liquid anchors, multicolumn how-it-works, multicolumn tiers, collage, multicolumn testimonials, collapsible-content FAQ, newsletter email capture

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
